info.title: VielHome API
info.description: REST API for VielHome — see AIHandoff V2 for architecture and business rules.

reference.description: Bank reference number / receipt number, if any.

amount.description: Negative waives debt, positive adds debt. Cannot be zero.
Defaults to the full original payment amount.

quorumPercent.description: Percentage (0-100) of eligible units that must vote for quorum.

unitId.description: The unit this case concerns, if any (06.07 Step 3: scope may be Property/Block/Building).

isAgainstManager.description: 06.07 Rule 017: marks this as a complaint about the current manager — blocks it from ever being assigned to whoever holds the MANAGER role.

isInternal.description: Only a privileged role (MANAGER/BOARD_MEMBER/ACCOUNTANT) may set this.

fileUrl.description: Location of the already-uploaded file (pre-signed URL / storage key).

fileType.description: 06.08 Rule 013: PDF, JPG, JPEG, or PNG.

expiresAt.description: 08.09 Rule 016 — this version's expiration date, if the underlying file has one (e.g. an insurance policy or permit). Metadata only — nothing auto-archives on this date.

fileUrl.description: Location of the already-uploaded file (pre-signed URL / storage key).

fileType.description: 06.08 Rule 013: PDF, JPG, JPEG, or PNG.

expiresAt.description: 08.09 Rule 016 — this version's expiration date, if the underlying file has one. Metadata only — nothing auto-archives on this date.

versionId.description: Defaults to the document's current version if omitted.

expiresAt.description: ISO date string; omit for a permanent grant
